title: Big Chests
description: More polished chest textures! The big is an exaggeration.
body:
A polished retexture of chests! Doesn't actually make them bigger, but they certainly _feel_ bigger. Well. We hope they do at least. Take a look!
![A closeup of a chest from the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/y3s61g1r/images/97d3c8d420ee299310b7f15cf9435f8e09cb0c88.png) ![A wall of chests from the resourcepack, two normal and one large on the bottom and two large on top. The bottom left and top right are trapped chests.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/y3s61g1r/images/e884cbdd59ec3f3cab778fcef55d93a07a4ef028.png)
This covers almost all chest related content in the base game, albeit excluding select textures (chest boat items and ender chests).
Made with love by us, The Bobbus, in Aseprite!
